Description: Pilot Flying J-branded fuel dealer / travel center at I-65 Exit 7 (SR 60) in Sellersburg, co-located with the Kenworth of Sellersburg dealership. Listed with diesel lanes, DEF, showers, restrooms, food, Wi-Fi and truck parking.
Certified CAT Scale located at the Pro Stop / Pilot Flying J dealer travel center at I-65 Exit 7 in Sellersburg.

Kenworth/Palmer Trucks full-service truck dealership at I-65 Exit 7 offering heavy-duty truck service, OEM repairs, parts and mobile diagnostics (PACCAR, Cummins, CAT). Co-located with the Pro Stop travel center at 1503 Avco Blvd. Service department hours Mon-Fri 7:00a-4:00p.

Commercial truck/OTR/ag tire dealer and service center on US-31 south of Clark Regional Airport, with 24/7 emergency truck tire service. Reached from I-65 via Exit 4 (northbound) or Exit 7 (southbound), roughly 3-4 miles along US-31.

Business Name: Travelodge by Wyndham Sellersburg / Louisville North
Description: Budget hotel just off I-65 Exit 7 in Sellersburg that advertises ample free parking for trucks and RVs, plus free Wi-Fi and a seasonal outdoor pool.

Business Name: Ramada by Wyndham Sellersburg / Louisville North
Description: Hotel off I-65 Exit 7 in Sellersburg that advertises free parking for trucks, buses, RVs and campers, with an indoor pool and free breakfast.
Fenced, gated, video-monitored storage facility on US-31 about 1-2 miles from I-65 Exit 7 that offers semi-trailer and RV parking, bookable via Truck Parking Club.

Fenced gravel truck & trailer parking lot on Avco Blvd with 24/7 access, immediately off I-65 Exit 7 near the Pro Stop / Kenworth of Sellersburg. Bookable hourly, daily, weekly or monthly through Truck Parking Club.
Mobile truck and trailer repair service covering the Sellersburg / Jeffersonville / Louisville-Southern Indiana area along I-65; phones answered 24 hours.
24/7 mobile truck repair, trailer, reefer and tire service dispatched to the Clarksville / Jeffersonville I-65 area.

TravelCenters of America full-service travel center at I-65 Exit 50A (US-50) in Seymour. Offers 184 truck parking spaces, 9 diesel fuel lanes, 10 showers, restaurant, laundry, driver lounge, a CAT Scale and an on-site TA Truck Service shop.

AMBEST independent truck stop at I-65 Exit 34 in Austin (Scott County), fully rebuilt and reopened after a major renovation. Offers about 30 truck parking spaces, 6 fuel lanes, 3 showers, deli/food, bulk DEF, ATM, a lighted paved lot and a CAT Scale.
Independent Marathon-branded fuel stop at I-65 Exit 41 (SR-250 / Uniontown) near Crothersville. Offers roughly 50 truck parking spaces, a convenience store and on-site repair; accepts CFN fuel cards.
Certified CAT Scale located at the TA Seymour travel center, I-65 Exit 50A. Open 24 hours for truck weighing.
CAT Scale located at the rebuilt Fuel Mart #783 truck stop at I-65 Exit 34 in Austin.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club - Seymour (1001 S Commerce Dr)
Description: Reservable truck and trailer parking lot in the Truck Parking Club network near I-65 Exit 50, adjacent to the Commerce Drive corridor and TA Seymour. Offers 24/7 access; drivers can book by the hour, day, week or month.
INDOT public rest area on southbound I-65 near mile marker 22 (Henryville area, north of Exit 19). Provides restrooms, vending and picnic area with approximately 64 truck parking spaces.
INDOT public rest area on northbound I-65 near mile marker 22 in the Henryville area, reported to offer restrooms and roughly 64 truck parking spaces.
On-site full-service truck repair shop at TA Seymour (I-65 Exit 50A) with 6 service bays, offering tire, mechanical and preventive maintenance plus roadside assistance, open 24 hours.
Family-owned 24/7 towing, recovery and repair company in Scottsburg (I-65 Exit 29 area), with light, medium and heavy-duty towing for tractor-trailers plus mobile and tire service.
24-hour towing and roadside assistance company in Seymour (I-65 Exit 50 area) handling cars and trucks, flat tires and jump-starts.

Commercial tire dealer and service center near I-65 Exit 50 on the Commerce Drive corridor in Seymour. Sells and services medium/heavy truck tires (Bridgestone, Firestone, Goodyear, Michelin and more) and offers 24-hour roadside tire service.
Budget hotel just off I-65 Exit 50B (US-50) in Seymour that offers on-site truck parking and coin laundry, convenient for drivers overnighting in the corridor.
Hotel at I-65 Exit 50B (E Tipton St) in Seymour reported by a travel directory to offer a well-lit lot with large-truck parking.

Indiana State Police weigh station on northbound I-65 near mile marker 52, about 1.5 miles north of US-50 (Exit 50) in Jackson County. A newer mainline weigh-in-motion facility with certified static scales and an inspection barn; PrePass/PreClear available.
Indiana State Police weigh station on southbound I-65 near mile marker 51 in Jackson County, north of the US-50/Exit 50 interchange at Seymour.

Full-service Pilot travel center at I-65 Exit 95 in Whiteland offering 24-hour diesel, showers, restrooms, laundry, restaurants, Wi-Fi and a CAT Scale. One of three major truck stops clustered at Exit 95.

Pilot Flying J-operated Flying J travel center at I-65 Exit 95 in Whiteland with 24-hour diesel, showers, restrooms, laundry, food, Wi-Fi and a CAT Scale. Blue Beacon Truck Wash and Speedco are co-located nearby on the same road.
Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 95 in Whiteland with 24-hour diesel, showers, restrooms, laundry, an Arby's, Wi-Fi and a CAT Scale. A Love's/Speedco tire-and-lube facility is co-located.
Road Ranger travel center at I-65 Exit 99 in Greenwood with diesel lanes, showers, laundry, a Subway, Wi-Fi, repair services and a CAT Scale. Northernmost full truck stop in the segment.

AMBEST-affiliated Circle K fuel stop (formerly Big Foot) near I-65 Exit 76B at Taylorsville, with diesel lanes, a convenience store, restrooms and limited overnight truck parking including hazmat parking.
Phillips 66-branded travel plaza reported at 65 W Main St in Greenwood near I-65 Exit 99, listed as offering public truck parking and diesel fuel.
Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center #37 at I-65 Exit 95 in Whiteland.

Business Name: CAT Scale (at Flying J Travel Center #656)
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Flying J Travel Center #656 at I-65 Exit 95 in Whiteland.
Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Love's Travel Stop #451 at I-65 Exit 95 in Whiteland.

Business Name: CAT Scale (at Road Ranger Travel Center)
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Road Ranger travel center at I-65 Exit 99 in Greenwood.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Whiteland
Description: 24-hour Blue Beacon Truck Wash at I-65 Exit 95 in Whiteland, located next to the Flying J. Offers truck/trailer washing, engine wash, undercarriage rinse and trailer washouts.

Love's/Speedco truck tire and lube facility co-located at I-65 Exit 95 in Whiteland. Offers commercial tire sales and repair, oil/lube service, light mechanical work and emergency roadside assistance.
24-hour Greenwood-based towing and recovery company serving the I-65/US-31 corridor, including semi and box-truck towing and flatbed service.
24/7 mobile diesel truck, trailer and tire repair dispatching to Greenwood, Whiteland and Franklin along I-65, US-31 and Johnson County, with typical arrival within 30-60 minutes.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club - Marr Rd Lot
Description: Reservable ~1.5-acre gravel truck and trailer parking lot near the Columbus airport in the I-65 corridor, with 24/7 access, lighting and cameras; booked through Truck Parking Club.
INDOT public rest area on I-65 near Taylorsville (about mile marker 73 northbound / 74 southbound) providing free truck parking and restrooms between Columbus and Franklin.

Full-service TA travel center on I-65 at Exit 130 (SR 334) on the northwest side of the Indianapolis metro. Offers BP diesel, restaurants, showers, laundry, an on-site truck service shop and a CAT Scale, with 169 truck parking spaces including Reserve-It reserved parking.

Love's Travel Stop on I-65 at Exit 133 in the Whitestown freight area northwest of Indianapolis. Open 24 hours with diesel, McDonald's and Subway, 7 showers, a CAT Scale and an on-site Love's Truck Tire Care center.
Certified CAT Scale located at the TA Whitestown travel center on I-65 at Exit 130 (SR 334). Weigh service available 24 hours at the host truck stop.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #459
Description: Certified CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #459 on I-65 at Exit 133 in Whitestown. Available 24 hours at the host location.

Full-service commercial truck repair shop co-located at TA Whitestown on I-65 at Exit 130, with 4 service bays offering tires, brakes, electrical, DOT inspections, diagnostics, HVAC, alignments and aftertreatment, plus 24-hour RoadSquad roadside assistance.
Love's Truck Care / tire care shop co-located at Love's #459 on I-65 at Exit 133, offering oil/PM service, light mechanical, and tire services with 24-hour roadside assistance.
Blue Beacon Truck Wash on I-65 at Exit 133 near the Whitestown/Zionsville truck-stop cluster, offering truck and trailer wash with undercarriage rinse, washout, tire dressing and polish services.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club - 4287 S Indianapolis Rd, Whitestown
Description: Reservable truck/trailer parking lot listed on Truck Parking Club, just off I-65 at Exit 133 near Love's in Whitestown, with 24/7 access. Hourly, daily, weekly and monthly reservations.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club - 3501 S 500 E, Whitestown
Description: Paved reservable truck/trailer parking lot listed on Truck Parking Club, just off I-65 at Exit 130 near the TA and Love's truck stops in Whitestown.
Budget hotel at I-65 Exit 103 (Southport Rd) on the south side of Indianapolis that offers free on-site parking including truck/bus parking. Truck-space capacity is very limited.

Mobile 24/7 roadside/tire repair provider that services the Indianapolis metro and I-65 corridor including Whitestown, Zionsville, Brownsburg and Boone County. Mobile-only; no fixed street address verified.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club - 5102 E 500 S, Whitestown
Description: Truck/trailer parking listing on Truck Parking Club in the Whitestown area near I-65.
Pilot Flying J travel center at I-65 Exit 139 (SR-39) in Lebanon. Offers diesel fuel lanes, showers, a Huddle House restaurant, and an on-site CAT Scale. Open 24 hours.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Flying J Lebanon #652
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Flying J Travel Center at I-65 Exit 139 in Lebanon. Weigh service is accessed through the host travel center.
Circle K fuel and convenience stop at I-65 Exit 168 (SR-38) east of Lafayette. Directories list roughly 8 truck parking spaces and 3 diesel lanes on the south side. Open 24 hours.

Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 175 (SR-25) in Lafayette, opened 2023. Amenities include diesel islands, 7 showers, a Hardee's, an on-site scale, and a co-located Love's Truck Care service center. Open 24 hours.

Co-located Love's Truck Care / Speedco service center at the Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 175 in Lafayette. Provides truck tire service, oil changes and PM service, light mechanical work, and roadside assistance.
Certified CAT Scale associated with the Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 175 in Lafayette. Weigh service is accessed through the host travel center.
Speedway fuel and convenience stop at I-65 Exit 178 (SR-43) near West Lafayette, carrying diesel. Listed in truck-stop directories; specific truck parking availability was not verified.
Pilot travel center at I-65 Exit 201 (US-24/US-231) in Remington. Offers diesel lanes, showers, a Subway, laundry, and an on-site CAT Scale. Open 24 hours.
Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center at I-65 Exit 201 in Remington. Weigh service is accessed through the host travel center.

Petro (TravelCenters of America) stopping center at I-65 Exit 201 (US-24) in Remington. Features about 150 truck parking spaces, 6 showers, an Iron Skillet restaurant, Dunkin' Express, laundry, a CAT Scale, and a co-located TA Truck Service shop. Open 24 hours.
Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Petro Stopping Center at I-65 Exit 201 in Remington. Weigh service is accessed through the host travel center.

Business Name: TA Truck Service at Petro Remington
Description: Co-located TA Truck Service repair facility at the Petro Stopping Center at I-65 Exit 201 in Remington. Full-service truck maintenance and repair with roadside assistance; directories list about 4 service bays.

Independent truck stop at I-65 Exit 205 (US-231), between Remington and Rensselaer. Directories list about 60 truck parking spaces, 5 diesel lanes, 2 showers, a travel store, and the on-site Crazy D's restaurant.
Family Express travel/convenience store at I-65 Exit 215 (SR-114) in Rensselaer, carrying diesel with truck parking, a deli, and travel store. Open 24 hours.

Full-service Pilot travel center in western Gary at the I-80/94 (Borman Expressway) Burr Street interchange, near the I-65 northern terminus. Amenities include diesel lanes, showers, CAT Scale, public laundry, and an on-site truck wash. Open 24 hours.

TravelCenters of America (TA) full-service truck stop in Gary at the I-80/94 (Borman Expressway) Burr Street interchange, near the I-65 northern terminus. On-site CAT Scale, TA Truck Service, showers, and food (Taco Bell, Pizza Hut Express, Quaker Steak & Lube Express). Roughly 318 parking spaces (about 40 reserved and 40 paid).

Petro Stopping Center (TravelCenters of America) at the Grant Street interchange with I-80/94 (Borman Expressway), essentially at the I-65 northern terminus. Iron Skillet restaurant, CAT Scale, TA Truck Service, and about 15 showers. Roughly 405 parking spaces.

Love's Travel Stop at the Grant Street / I-80/94 (Borman Expressway) interchange adjacent to the I-65 northern terminus. CAT Scale, Godfather's Pizza and Naf Naf Grill, 9 showers, and 154 truck parking spaces. Reopened after a fire with added restaurants.

Pilot Travel Center directly on I-65 at Exit 240 (SR-2, Lowell/Hebron), the first major mainline stop at the corridor's northern end. Wendy's, CAT Scale, 8 showers and about 135 parking spaces. Open 24 hours.
Flying J Travel Center directly on I-65 at Exit 240 (SR-2 / 181st Ave, Lowell/Hebron). Denny's restaurant, CAT Scale, 15 showers, 4 truck service bays and roughly 375 parking spaces. Open 24 hours.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center (Burr Street, Gary)
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center on Burr Street in Gary, near the I-80/94 (Borman) interchange and the I-65 northern terminus.

Business Name: CAT Scale at TA Gary (Burr Street)
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at TA Gary on Burr Street, near the I-80/94 (Borman) interchange and the I-65 northern terminus.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Petro Gary (Grant Street)
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Petro Stopping Center on Grant Street, at the I-65 northern terminus / I-80/94 (Borman) interchange.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #417 (Grant Street, Gary)
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #417 on Grant Street, adjacent to the I-65 northern terminus / I-80/94 (Borman) interchange.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center (Hebron)
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #448 on I-65 at Exit 240 (SR-2, Lowell/Hebron).

Business Name: CAT Scale at Flying J Travel Center (Hebron)
Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Flying J Travel Center #653 on I-65 at Exit 240 (SR-2 / 181st Ave, Lowell/Hebron).

Goodyear-owned commercial truck tire and service center on Burr Street in Gary, next to the Burr Street travel-center cluster off I-80/94 (Borman), near the I-65 northern terminus. Commercial tire sales, mounting and service.

Southern Tire Mart commercial truck tire and truck-care center co-located at the Pilot Travel Center on Burr Street in Gary; offers commercial tires and DOT inspections. Near I-80/94 (Borman) and the I-65 northern terminus.

Long-established commercial, industrial and OTR truck tire dealer in Gary offering tire sales, recapping, foam-fill and road service across Northwest Indiana. Located in central Gary near the I-65 north terminus / Broadway corridor.

Independent semi-truck tire shop in the Miller section of Gary offering new/used tires, mounting, repair, regrooving, retreading and light mechanical work. Sits just off US-12/20 near I-80/94 and the Indiana Toll Road, east of the I-65 northern terminus.

Business Name: Truck Wash at Pilot Travel Center (Burr Street, Gary)
Description: The Pilot Travel Center on Burr Street in Gary lists an on-site truck wash among its amenities. Located off I-80/94 (Borman) near the I-65 northern terminus.

Business Name: TA Truck Service at Petro Gary
Description: TA Truck Service full-service repair shop co-located at the Petro Gary stopping center (Grant Street), offering heavy-duty truck repair and 24-hour roadside assistance at the I-65 northern terminus / I-80/94 (Borman) interchange.

Business Name: TA Truck Service at TA Gary
Description: TA Truck Service repair facility (6 bays) co-located at TA Gary on Burr Street, offering heavy-duty truck repair and roadside assistance near the I-80/94 (Borman) interchange and the I-65 northern terminus.

Love's Speedco truck-service center in Gary providing oil/lube and preventive maintenance, commercial tire service, light mechanical work and emergency roadside assistance. Located in the Gary freight hub near I-80/94 and the I-65 northern terminus.

Established Merrillville towing company (since 1967) offering towing and accident/collision cleanup for Lake County, on Broadway near I-65 Exit 253 (US-30). Note: primarily light and medium-duty towing with limited weekday hours.

Business Name: Gary Mobile On-Site Truck & Trailer Repair
Description: Mobile truck and trailer repair / 24-7 roadside service advertised for Gary and the surrounding NW Indiana corridor (engine, brakes, suspension, roadside).
Interstate hotel off I-65 near US-30 (Exit 253) in Merrillville whose official listing advertises free outdoor parking including truck and bus parking.

24-hour Walmart Supercenter near I-65 Exit 253 (US-30/Broadway area) that is commonly used for overnight truck parking, though space is limited and permission is at the store's discretion. Drivers should call ahead.

Business Name: Golden Group Properties Truck & Trailer Parking
Description: Fenced and gated reservable truck/trailer parking lot at Golden Group Properties in western Gary with guard and camera surveillance, in the freight hub near I-80/94 (Borman) and the I-65 northern terminus. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.
Fenced reservable truck/trailer parking lot in western Gary with an on-site mechanic shop, in the freight hub near I-80/94 and the I-65 northern terminus. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.
Gravel, fenced 24/7 reservable truck/trailer parking lot in Gary off Chase Street, near the Grant Street travel-center cluster and the I-65 northern terminus. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.
Reservable truck/trailer parking lot in Merrillville off Cleveland Street, in the I-65 Exit 253 (US-30) area. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.

Reservable 90+ space truck, trailer and fleet parking facility in Hammond, in the far-northwest Borman/Chicago-line freight area served off I-80/94 and I-90 near the I-65 corridor's NW terminus connection. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.

24/7 fenced and gated reservable truck parking in Hammond (south of I-90, north of I-94), in the far-northwest freight/IL-state-line area near the I-65 corridor's NW terminus connection. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.

Indiana State Police weigh/inspection station on I-65 southbound near Lowell (approximately mile marker 243, just north of the SR-2/Exit 240 area) in Lake County; accepts PrePass. The former northbound station at this location is abandoned.
